title: Add a -a/--all option to "buildah containers"
body: Add a --all option to "buildah containers" that causes it to go through the full list of containers, providing information about the ones that aren't buildah containers in addition to the ones that are.

comments.body: I still think the list should contain and indicator that this container was not created by buildah.
Inserted a column after the first which marks buildah containers with an asterisk.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/21b1a9349daccfdc8abc045ca05c9f0ea7a2e4d4.1498165947867887872/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing 21b1a9349daccfdc8abc045ca05c9f0ea7a2e4d4 to master...
LGTM, thanks a bunch for adding the "Mark of Buildah!"
